items.name: Inbound Support
items.description: Transform your inbound support operations with AI-powered routing and intelligent IVR.

hero.subtitle: AI-Powered Customer Support
hero.description: Deliver exceptional customer experiences with intelligent call routing, AI-powered IVR, and real-time sentiment analysis.

features.title: Smart Call Routing
features.description: Route calls to the right agent based on skills, language, and availability.

features.title: AI-Powered IVR
features.description: Self-service options that resolve 60% of inquiries without agent transfer.

features.title: Real-time Sentiment
features.description: Detect frustrated customers and escalate automatically.

features.title: Callback Queue
features.description: Offer callbacks instead of hold times.

items.name: Outbound Sales
items.description: Power your sales team with predictive dialers, local presence, and AI-powered conversation intelligence.

hero.subtitle: Sales Acceleration Platform
hero.description: Empower your sales team with AI-powered dialers, local presence, and conversation intelligence that closes more deals.

features.title: Predictive Dialer
features.description: AI-powered dialing that maximizes talk time.

features.title: Local Presence
features.description: Display local numbers to increase answer rates by 400%.

features.title: Conversation Intelligence
features.description: Real-time coaching and talk ratio analysis.

items.name: Global Remote Teams
items.description: Connect your global team with enterprise-grade voice, video, and messaging.

hero.subtitle: Unified Communications for Distributed Teams
hero.description: Connect your global workforce with crystal-clear voice, HD video, and seamless collaboration tools—no matter where they work.

features.title: Global Numbers
features.description: Local numbers in 100+ countries for your team.

features.title: Mobile App
features.description: Full phone system on any device, anywhere.

features.title: Video Conferencing
features.description: HD video meetings with screen sharing.

features.title: Team Messaging
features.description: Secure team chat with file sharing.

items.name: Enterprise
items.description: Enterprise-grade solutions with advanced security, compliance, and dedicated support.

hero.subtitle: Secure, Scalable, Compliant
hero.description: Enterprise-grade cloud communications with advanced security, regulatory compliance, and dedicated support for large organizations.

features.title: SSO & SAML
features.description: Single sign-on with your identity provider.

features.title: Compliance
features.description: HIPAA, GDPR, SOC 2, and PCI DSS compliance.
